five_layer_learning.real_commercial_usecase: Run 2.8 continues the same commercial PPT design usecase rather than advancing to Run 3.0.
five_layer_learning.multimodal_tutorial_case_database: run2_8_tutorial_decomposition.json decomposes tutorial/video/audio/transcript/image/interaction observations into native PPT obligations without storing copied media.
five_layer_learning.design_memory: run2_8_executable_design_memory.json turns derived observations into executable schema bindings with code binding functions.
five_layer_learning.skill_workflow: run2_8_workflow_gate_matrix.json requires per-slide decomposition units, memory binding ids, code bindings, layout budgets, and trace fields before generated output can pass.
five_layer_learning.code_generated_native_ppt: run2_8_full_skill generated native editable PPT shapes and records actual native module calls in trace_manifest.json.

control_boundary.bad_memory_schema: commercial_case_plus_decomposition_only; executable design memory and gate matrix are forbidden

visual_learning.gemini_summary: Gemini identified stronger hierarchy, cleaner layout, high-contrast hero-object emphasis, and clearer data-to-memory-to-gate-to-native-PPT routing in Run 2.8 full compared with controls.
visual_learning.useful_delta: Run 2.8 improves the proof mechanism: trace now records actual native module calls, and full-arm required code bindings are checked against rendered metrics.
visual_learning.remaining_visual_gap: Contact-sheet scale still limits fine typography review; full skill series remains too wide for small-text inspection; native render inspection and human approval remain missing.

next_required_action: Continue the same five layers: thicken tutorial/video decomposition quality, make executable design memory more specific, keep strict workflow gates, improve editorial typography/spacing/climax composition, and rerun four arms.
